---
name: Maintenance task
about: Track OSS maintenance, privacy hardening, tests, docs, release, or Codex workflow work
title: "[Maintenance]: "
labels: maintenance
assignees: ""
---

## Maintenance Goal

What maintainer burden, review risk, test gap, release task, or documentation gap does this address?

## Proposed Work

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Affected Area

- [ ] Tests / CI
- [ ] Docs / release process
- [ ] Privacy / security
- [ ] AI prompts / generated content
- [ ] Learning data consistency
- [ ] SRS / FSRS / mastery
- [ ] Guardian dashboard / reports
- [ ] Refactor / code organization
- [ ] Codex workflow / maintainer automation

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior or assumptions changed

## Privacy Check

- [ ] No real student names, school data, classroom records, API keys, or private learning reports are included.
- [ ] Fixtures, screenshots, prompts, and examples use synthetic/generic data only.
